title: Optimizing a Dynamic Resource Allocation Model
scenario: Design a resource allocation algorithm for a distributed team of developers working on multiple projects. The algorithm should allocate resources efficiently, taking into account team member skills, project priorities, and available time slots. The output should be a JSON object representing the optimized resource allocation plan.
constraints: Must consider ' skill sets' as a resource allocation factor
Must include a ' priority' factor for project allocation

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated output adhere to the specified 'round-robin' scheduling algorithm and include 'skill sets' and 'priority' factors?
Does the generated output efficiently allocate resources, ensuring optimal team productivity and project completion?
Is the generated algorithmic logic clear and concise, with properly nested if-else statements and conditionals?
